statusLine.command:
input=$(cat); now=$(date '+%Y/%m/%d %H:%M:%S'); ip=$(icli ip ps1 2>/dev/null || echo ''); user=$(whoami); host=$(hostname -s); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); git_branch=$(git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || git -C "$cwd" describe --tags --exact-match 2>/dev/null || echo ''); git_dirty=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --quiet 2>/dev/null && echo '' || echo '*'); printf '➜ %s %s %s@%s %s' "$now" "$ip" "$user" "$host" "$cwd"; [ -n "$git_branch" ] && printf ' (git:%s%s)' "$git_branch" "$git_dirty"; printf '
'
